entry.title: Baby bump
entry.summary:
Author: Kandyscorner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,439Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 637

Summary: requested on tumblr:okay so the reader finding out she’s pregnant with Jason’s baby but doesn’t want to tell him because she’s scared of his reaction and tries to leave without telling him but he finds out anyway? (could it be angst to fluff and include the batfamily?) More has been added. Girl Dad! Jason Todd to follow.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,639Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Just a collection of my different domaystic fics for 2026. All are x reader fics Characters include:Jason ToddJamie TarttDennis WhitakerMichael 'Robby' RobinavitchJack AbbotBrendon Park 'the Shark'Jesse Van Horn These have all been crossposted to my Tumblr @redsakura101 (I have not done every single day/prompt, just the ones that inspired me ♥️) Hope you enjoy!!

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 129,814Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 766

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: The lock you checked three times
entry.summary:
Author: Angelina_2206

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,663Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Jason Todd is a problem. He wears a leather jacket, knuckles taped and an attitude that rots like Gotham. He gets in fights and smokes behind the gym, and teachers are torn between expelling him and begging him to apply to Ivy Leagues. You're the transfer from Metropolis. You're broke and live in a basement apartment. You work two jobs and don't talk about why you left your old school. You made a mistake, and Jason stopped talking to you. Except at night, because thats when Red hood watches you. (Tags updates throughout each posts)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: THE LIGHT IN YOUR WINDOW (English)
entry.summary:
Author: Rowanrowmar

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,813Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Alice (you) is blind and is about to be sold by her mother to a Crime Alley cartel for a few coins, but you manages to escape before the transaction is completed. During your pursuit, ends up at the feet of a huge, leather-clad figure that smells of blood. Has no idea who it is, but couldn't be more grateful (and terrified) by how easily the person takes care of your captors. And if you now has to take care of a bunch of kids (and a supposedly bloodthirsty vigilante adult) in exchange for a safe place to sleep, that's another story. Or Jason, dressed as Redhood, finds a woman on the outskirts of his territory who is a victim of human trafficking, and by a twist of fate, ends up giving her refuge in one of his safe houses in exchange for her taking care of the orphans he has there.   ______________________English is not my native language, I apologize if there is any mistakeThe Reader uses she/her pronouns and is named, not a self-insert, more like a story in second-person.

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,643Chapters: 11/45Kudos: 142

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.title: The Star that Wouldn't Die
entry.summary:
Author: ShadDork

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,483Chapters: 23/29Kudos: 601

Summary: Jason Todd forgot a lot of things after the lazarus pit's putrid green waters helped restore him back to life. Most of it was unimportant information, things that he didn't need to worry about, after all, he could always relearn names, smells, and re-read books. Lost memories weren't as easy to deal with the loss of, but he could always make new ones. The memories that remained were largely traumatic, and the others were slowly being uncovered as time passed. He wished that Dick hadn't said that name, your name. Reigniting feelings and memories. Guilt was already a large part of his existence, and this new guilt about forgetting you entirely was just making everything worse. He shouldn't track you down in case it accidentally put you in danger. But he wanted to make sure that you were okay. It was a battle he lost against himself. As memories resurface and an infuriating case revolving around a club with an asinine name, can he continue to be in your life without dragging you down with him?

entry.title: Moving Back, Forwards.
entry.summary:
Author: Glitterfangsbullet

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,928Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 57

Summary: You were never supposed to get this close. It was never supposed to matter—whatever this is between you and Jason Todd. Not quite love, not quite nothing. He doesn’t know you, not really.Not the way you know him. And maybe that’s why it works. However the universe has a strange sense of humor, and it keeps reminding you that relshionships built on secrets have an expiration date.And yours is running out.

entry.summary:

entry.title: There's Just Something About You Baby
entry.summary:
Author: ghst06

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,811Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: She's a daycare teacher in Gotham trying her best to survive in a city she can never seem to escape. Jayda is trying to find herself outside of being the red hood for the first time since she came back to life. What happens when two lost people meet in a city both of them can't seem to abandon? This is butch lesbian Jason Todd/ femme lesbian reader, Jason is named Jayda in this fic.I've never posted a fic before so any constructive feedback is welcome!! I'll update as often as I can.
